channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Rubber Band Gun – “Frodoboy” (Feat. Star Moles)
item.description: 🚀 Groove into another galaxy with Rubber Band Gun's latest track "Frodoboy" featuring the stellar Star Moles! 🌟🎶 #NewMusicFriday

item.title: Bruce Springsteen Covers The Doors & Flavor Flav Spices Up Patti Smith Jam At American Music Honors
item.description: 🎸 Bruce Springsteen's tribute to The Doors & Flavor Flav's surprise at Patti Smith's jam = pure 🔥 at American Music Honors! 🔊🎶 #MusicLegends #AMH

item.title: All Hail Kacey Musgraves and Her Horse-Riding, George Strait-Covering, New Music Premiering Coachella Set
item.description: Yeehaw! 🤠🎶 Kacey Musgraves stole the show at Coachella with her epic set featuring new tunes and a George Strait cover! #MusicalMagic

item.title: PinkPantheress’ Coachella Set Included Janelle Monáe, Dev Hynes, Zara Larsson: Watch
item.description: 🎤🌟 PinkPantheress brought the ultimate squad to Coachella! Watch the magic unfold with Janelle Monáe, Dev Hynes, and Zara Larsson! ✨🎶 #CoachellaVibes

item.title: Listen to Madonna’s New Song “I Feel So Free”
item.description: 🎶 Feelin' the vibes with Madonna's new bop! Turn up the volume and let the music take you on a journey! 🎵 #Madonna #NewMusicAlert
